themes.reasoning_notes: Its upkeep trigger repeatedly creates 1/1 Soldier tokens for the Horse controller's opponents, making it a dedicated token engine.
It's an Artifact Creature, so it naturally fits artifact-matters shells, but its gameplay identity is more token-focused.
Artifact creature with no artifact-matters text; artifact shells can play it, but its Oracle text does not reward artifact synergies directly.
It repeatedly creates Soldier tokens, but for opponents on your upkeep, so this is token production without typical token-deck payoff alignment.
